name: z-image
description: Z-Image Turbo — fast local image generation via sd-server (stable-diffusion.cpp). Generate several at once, see them in a labeled grid, and recreate any exactly by seed.
author: sapphire

app.label: Z-Image Studio
app.description: Generate images directly — tune prompts, CFG, seed and steps in real time

settings.label: sd-server URL
settings.help: Base URL of the sd-server (stable-diffusion.cpp) running Z-Image Turbo. Use the server's LAN IP if Sapphire runs elsewhere.

settings.label: Max images per call
settings.help: Upper limit on how many images one tool call can generate (protects VRAM/time).

settings.label: Default steps
settings.help: Z-Image Turbo is tuned for 8 steps.

settings.label: Default negative prompt
settings.help: Applied when the model doesn't override it. Z-Image needs little-to-none.

settings.label: Image width (px)
settings.help: Output width in pixels. Z-Image Turbo is tuned for 1024.

settings.label: Image height (px)
settings.help: Output height in pixels. Z-Image Turbo is tuned for 1024.

settings.label: Static keywords
settings.help: Always appended to the prompt (e.g. 'cinematic, wide shot').

settings.label: AI name
settings.help: The name the AI writes to mean itself (e.g. 'Sapphire'). Case-insensitive. Wherever it appears in a prompt it's auto-replaced with the AI appearance below — so the AI just writes the name, never the description.

settings.label: AI appearance
settings.help: Physical description filled in wherever the AI name appears (e.g. 'a short American woman with brown hair').

settings.label: User name
settings.help: The name the AI writes to mean the user (e.g. 'Fishy'). Case-insensitive. Auto-replaced with the user appearance below.

settings.label: User appearance
settings.help: Physical description filled in wherever the user name appears.

settings.label: Per-image timeout (seconds)
settings.help: Max wait for a single image from sd-server.
